title: Starmer to Roll Out UK Job Center Tools to Beat AI Work Threat
description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will promise to prevent any community from being left behind in the “tech revolution” by using artificial intelligence tools to help people find work.

title: Stocks Face Rising Risk With Mega AI Deals Ready to Flood Market
description: A flood of new shares from companies looking to fund their artificial intelligence ambitions is raising questions on Wall Street about whether there will be enough buyers to soak them all up and what this pile of fresh equity will mean for stock prices more broadly.

title: Kevin O’Leary’s Huge Data Center in Canada Faces a Skeptical Public
description: A proposal by a Kevin O’Leary-backed firm to build Canada’s largest data center in northwestern Alberta is facing pushback from some residents and Indigenous groups.
